name: Awaria
description:
The Game Awaria made by VANRIPPER.

Characters: Yaga, Usterka, Zmora, Cutwire Twins, Nikita and Sylvia.

Plot: You was the new new tunnel runner on the block your boss Yaga and her assistant Usterka where wating at entrance of the tunnel to start they job.

  • Enjoy claustrophobic penal labor.

  • Break and panic under constant time pressure.

  • Dodge deadly projectiles and safety violations.

  • You may even... kiss a ghost?
